Name: Base items
Description:
Defines the basic conceptual meaning of a data point. 
Identifies the framework in which a data point is included. For FINREP, it indicates in which group of element of the financial statement should be included the data point (e.g. assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses). For COREP, it indicates whether the data point should be computed in the numerator (own funds) or the denominator (exposures) of the Pillar I solvency ratio. 
It may determine whether the data point has a "debit" or a "credit" attribute.

Name: Main category
Description:
Specifies the nature of the item reported (i.e. answers the question: what is reported?). 
For financial instruments, defines the instrument (e.g. deposits, debt securities issued...) or range of instruments reported. 
It should be defined for each data point.

Name: Approach
Description: Approach used for the calculation of capital requirements (or exposure value in LR)

Name: Boolean total
Description: Dimensions having only two values (usually denoted true and false)

Name: Collateral/Guarantees
Description: Defines the terms and conditions of the collateral and guarantees

Name: Computability in own funds
Description: Specifies the way in which the item computes in own funds

Name: Callability of the instruments
Description: For instruments on which a call option has been incorporated, it indicates whether they meet the conditions to qualify for inclusion in own funds.

Name: Credit protection
Description: Concepts related with the application of Credit Risk Mitigation techniques.

Name: Credit quality
Description: Defines the credit quality of the exposures according to the Credit Quality Steps scale

Name: Counterparty
Description: Party other than the reporting institution in a contract or transaction.

Name: Currency
Description: Currency

Name: Exposure classes
Description: Defines the exposure class for capital requirement purposes

Name: External ratings
Description: Concepts related with external credit ratings.

Name: Event type
Description: Defines the type of event that has generated an operational loss.

Name: Geographical area
Description: Geographical area

Name: Impairment
Description: Concepts related with monitoring credit quality of financial assets and off-balance sheet items (e.g. past due, impaired, defaulted)

Name: Type of market
Description: Defines the type of market on which reported instruments are traded. It includes the fair value hierarchy.

Name: NACE code
Description: NACE classification of economic activities

Name: Percentages
Description: Percentages

Name: Positions in the instrument
Description: Defines the position (long/short) taken in the instrument, as well as the aggregation level related to the market risk capital requirement calculations (gross/net).

Name: Portfolio
Description: Defined the portfolios reported. It comprises both accounting portfolios (e.g. Available-for-sale) and prudential portfolios (e.g. trading book).

Name: Reference period
Description: Defines a relative time point (reference date or period) to which the data refers.

Name: Purpose
Description: Purpose of the contract or transaction.

Name: Related parties/Relationships
Description: Defines the relationship between the reporting institution with an entity or a person; in particular, it specifies the type of related party.

Name: Role in the securitisation process
Description: Defines the role played by the reporting entity in the securitisation process.

Name: Type of risk
Description: Indicates the type of risk arising from exposures or transactions (e.g. credit risk or market risk).

Name: Risk transfer treatment
Description: Type of risk transfer (synthetic or transitional securitisations) and accounting treatment of the transaction

Name: Securitisation structure
Description: Tranche of the exposure in the securitisation structure

Name: Type of activity
Description: Defines the type of activity reported (e.g. asset management or custody)

Name: Time interval
Description: Time bands (e.g. > 60 days <= 90 days).

Name: Underlying exposures in securitisations
Description: Underlying exposures in securitisations

Name: Correlation Trading Portfolio
Description: CTP or non-CTP

Name: Liquidity
Description: Defines different liquidity-related conditions of assets and liabilities

Name: Legal entity
Description: An association, corporation, partnership, proprietorship, trust, or individual that has legal standing in the eyes of law

Name: Security
Description: Financial instrument that represents: an ownership position in a publicly-traded corporation (stock), a creditor relationship with governmental body or a corporation (bond), or rights to ownership as represented by an option.

Name: Securitisation
Description: Pool of individual assets packaged as a security

Name: Integers
Description: Integers

Name: Contingent scenario
Description: Defines the contingent scenarios whose impact is reported

Name: Scope of consolidation
Description: Different scopes of consolidation of reporting when different from CRR scope

Name: Covered bond
Description: Name or unambiguous abbreviation of a covered bond issuing entity and the designation of a covered bond

Name: Clients code
Description: Code of individual clients or group of connected clients

Name: Accounting standard
Description: The accounting standard used to prepare figures or reports

Name: Code Lists
Description: Codes for use in various metrics

Name: Identification String
Description: String used as an artificial identifier

Name: Date
Description: Date

Name: Currency conversion approach
Description: Indicates how monetary values should be reported i.e. if they should be converted to a single reporting currency, or reported as-is in the underlying currency

Name: Interval of amounts
Description: Indicates sizes of amounts intervals

Name: Entity
Description: An association, corporation, partnership, proprietorship, trust, or individual

Name: Own funds and elegible liabilities
Description: Own funds and elegible liabilities

Name: Contracts/Transactions
Description: Defines contracts or transactions

Name: ESG classification
Description: ESG

Name: Properties
Description: Contains Items which are counterparts of Properties.

Name: Not applicable
Description: Contains Items which do not belong to any specified Category such as those that are typically used only in dropdowns on Headers or Variables. It is also linked by Properties that do not belong to any real Category. Such enumerated Properties can refer to Items from Categories: "Not applicable", "Properties" and in such case they can also use Items of other Categories, in particular by being linked to such mixed SubCategory.

Name: Templates
Description: Contains Items which are Templates for purposes of resembling filing indicator variables in the model.

Name: Contracts/Transactions
Description: Information related with Contracts. The difference to CR Category is that this is enumerated
